test case id: tc-profile-002 title: empty username module: profile source pages: 1 preconditions: user is logged in. test data: new username: , new email: updateduser@example.com test steps: 1. navigate to the profile page. 2. leave the username field empty. 3. enter new email "updateduser@example.com" in the email field. 4. click on the update profile button. expected result: error message displayed indicating empty username.

test case id: tc-register-001 title: successful registration module: register source pages: 1 preconditions: user is not registered. test data: username: newuser, email: newuser@example.com, password: newpassword test steps: 1. navigate to the registration page. 2. enter username "newuser" in the username field. 3. enter email "newuser@example.com" in the email field. 4. enter password "newpassword" in the password field. 5. confirm password "newpassword". 6. click on the register button. expected result: user is redirected to the login page.
